# Taste Profile

**Derived from:** STREAMING_LOG.md (auto-generated — do not hand-edit)
**Last updated:** not yet regenerated

## 2026-07-21 — data loss notice

The prior taste profile was derived from a watch-history log that has since been lost
(see `STREAMING_LOG.md`). Rather than fabricate signature genres, actor affinities, or
explicit preferences from nothing, this file is left empty on purpose. It will
regenerate automatically the next time the `top-picks` or `sync-watch-history` skill
runs against a real, re-synced `STREAMING_LOG.md`.

If Susan has stated explicit loved/hated categories in chat before this file
regenerates, those should be captured under "Explicit Preferences" as soon as the
profile is rebuilt, per the `sync-watch-history` skill's format:

```markdown
## Explicit Preferences
## Signature Genres
## Generic Genres (lower confidence on their own)
## Actor Affinity
## Patterns to Avoid
```
